description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly dark gray coloration and striking white linear striations running across its surface. The stone has a somewhat flattened, oblong form with rounded edges and a slightly undulating top, giving it a natural, weathered appearance. The white bands are unevenly spaced and vary in thickness, creating a visually dynamic pattern that stands out against the darker background. The surface texture appears rough and matte, with visible grooves and indentations that suggest exposure to natural elements over time. The stone's mass and density are evident from its solid, compact form, and it is large enough to act as a physical barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. A scale marker in one view indicates the stone is approximately 7-8 cm tall and about 20-22 cm at its longest dimension.
description: A dark gray, oblong stone with prominent white striations and a rough, weathered surface. Its irregular shape and striking pattern make it a noticeable natural obstacle.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's broad, slightly domed top with several bold white stripes running diagonally across the surface.
description_view_1: The elongated side profile is visible here, showing the stone's length and the continuity of the white striations along its side.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the stone's relatively flat base and the scale marker, emphasizing its thickness and the clarity of the white banding.
description_view_3: The view shows the stone's uneven, grooved surface and the way the white stripes wrap around its contours, with the scale marker partially visible.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or embedded in the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular, natural white linear striations running diagonally and horizontally across the dark gray stone, creating a striking contrast and organic pattern.
attribute_weathering: Surface appears rough and matte with visible grooves and indentations, indicating moderate natural weathering and exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural landscaping elements or contrasts with paved surfaces, sometimes partially embedded in soil or surrounded by grass or gravel.
